description: Maps support agents to their team leaders for ticket routing. Maintained manually by client.

columns.name: agent_name
columns.note: Agent display name (must match agent_name in Analysis_Results exactly)

columns.name: team_leader_slack_id
columns.note: Team leader Slack user ID (e.g. U012AB3CD) for DM routing

notes: If an agent is not found in this sheet, tickets fall back to assigned_to = 'QA-Inbox'
